channel.title: Awesome Mac - 最近新增应用
channel.description: 根据中文列表整理的最近新增 macOS 应用。

item.title: DB Pro
item.category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库 App: DB Pro Description: 用于查询和管理 SQL 数据库的客户端。 Website: https://dbpro.app Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
App: DB Pro
Description: 用于查询和管理 SQL 数据库的客户端。
Website: https://dbpro.app
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: TrailBase
item.category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
item.description: Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库 App: TrailBase Description: 基于 SQLite 的开源后端平台，提供类型安全 API、认证和管理工具。 Website: https://trailbase.io Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 开发者工具 / 数据库
App: TrailBase
Description: 基于 SQLite 的开源后端平台，提供类型安全 API、认证和管理工具。
Website: https://trailbase.io
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Lunacy
item.category: 设计和产品 / 设计工具
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 设计工具 App: Lunacy Description: 内置素材并支持实时协作的矢量设计工具。 Website: https://icons8.com/lunacy Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 设计和产品 / 设计工具
App: Lunacy
Description: 内置素材并支持实时协作的矢量设计工具。
Website: https://icons8.com/lunacy
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Simple Diagrams
item.category: 设计和产品 / 原型流程
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 原型流程 App: Simple Diagrams Description: 用于快速绘制手绘风格草图的图表工具。 Website: https://www.simplediagrams.com/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 设计和产品 / 原型流程
App: Simple Diagrams
Description: 用于快速绘制手绘风格草图的图表工具。
Website: https://www.simplediagrams.com/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Capty
item.category: 设计和产品 / 截图工具
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 截图工具 App: Capty Description: 内置编辑和标注功能的录屏与截图工具。 Website: https://capty.app/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 设计和产品 / 截图工具
App: Capty
Description: 内置编辑和标注功能的录屏与截图工具。
Website: https://capty.app/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Screenpipe
item.category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制 App: Screenpipe Description: 支持 AI 搜索的本地屏幕与麦克风录制工具。 Open Source: https://github.com/mediar-ai/screenpipe Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制
App: Screenpipe
Description: 支持 AI 搜索的本地屏幕与麦克风录制工具。
Open Source: https://github.com/mediar-ai/screenpipe
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Tight Studio
item.category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制 App: Tight Studio Description: 支持智能缩放、字幕和 AI 配音的录屏工具。 Website: https://tight.studio/ Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
item.content:encoded:
Category: 设计和产品 / 屏幕录制
App: Tight Studio
Description: 支持智能缩放、字幕和 AI 配音的录屏工具。
Website: https://tight.studio/
Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs
Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Droply
item.category: 设计和产品 / 其它工具
item.description: Category: 设计和产品 / 其它工具 App: Droply Description: 离线批量图片去背景工具。 Website: https://convergencelab.gumroad.com/l/droply Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.title: Fluent
item.description: Category: AI 工具 App: Fluent Description: 可在各类应用中调用模型和上下文的 AI 助手。 Website: https://fluentmac.app Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.description: Category: AI 工具 App: RecurseChat Description: 支持自定义工作流的本地优先 AI 聊天应用。 Website: https://recurse.chat Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c

item.description: Category: 通信 App: BlurScreen App Description: 可在录屏或共享时即时模糊屏幕敏感内容的工具。 Website: https://www.blurscreen.app Commit: docs: refresh app descriptions in localized READMEs Commit URL: https://github.com/jaywcjlove/awesome-mac/commit/be4a2d80c705562a79ec5ed9906aa6a21607053c
